page: Amazon Web Services m8id.metal-96xl is a bare-metal general-purpose server instance powered by Intel x86_64 processors. The system features 192 physical cores and 384 vCPUs with a dedicated allocation running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance includes 22800 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, providing high-capacity, low-latency local storage directly attached to the hardware. For network connectivity, the server delivers a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers and low-latency communication.

As a bare-metal instance, the m8id.metal-96xl offers direct access to physical hardware, eliminating virtualization overhead. This resource density and high-capacity local storage make it suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, enterprise applications, and workloads requiring high-speed local storage and substantial parallel processing capabilities.
